moduleTitle: Identification, assessment, and management of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities
questionText: Does your organization have a process for identifying, assessing, and managing environmental risks and/or opportunities?
questionKo: 귀사는 환경 리스크 및 / 또는 기회를 식별 , 평가 및 관리하는 프로세스가 있습니까 ?
issueTags: Water, Ocean, Biodiversity, Plastics, Climate Change, Forests
sectorTags: Financial services, Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Biodiversity - Mines, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: For many organizations, environmental issues pose significant challenges, now and in the future. This question establishes whether the organization has a process for identifying, assessing, and managing environmental issues so that data users may gauge the organization's awareness of its own environmental risks and opportunities.

options: No, but we plan to within the next two years
No, and we do not plan to within the next two years
optionsKo: No, but we plan to within the next two years
No, 및 we do not plan to within the next two years

columns.text: Risks and/or opportunities evaluated in this process
Is this process informed by the dependencies and/or impacts process?
columns.textKo: Is this 프로세스 informed by the dependencies 및/또는 impacts 프로세스?

columns.text: Primary reason for not evaluating risks and/or opportunities
options: Lack of internal resources, capabilities, or expertise (e.g., due to organization size)
Judged to be unimportant or not relevant
columns.textKo: 리스크 및/또는 기회를 평가하지 않는 주된 이유
optionsKo: Lack of internal resources, capabilities, 또는 expertise (e.g., due to organization size)
Judged to be unimportant 또는 not relevant

columns.text: Explain why you do not evaluate risks and/or opportunities and describe any plans to do so in the future
columns.textKo: 리스크 및/또는 기회를 평가하지 않는 이유와 향후 계획을 설명하십시오

columns.text: Explain why you do not have a process for evaluating both risks and opportunities that is informed by a dependencies and/or impacts process
columns.textKo: 그 이유를 설명 you do not have a 프로세스 for evaluating both 리스크 및 기회 that is informed by a dependencies 및/또는 impacts 프로세스

guidance.text:
Process in place (column 1) 
Select "Yes" if your organization has any process in place for identifying, assessing, and managing risks and/or opportunities. Select "Yes" regardless of whether both risks and opportunities are assessed, and regardless of whether the process is integrated (i.e. across multiple environmental issues, and any other issues) or separated. You will have the opportunity to provide further details on your assessment process in 2.2.2.
Only select "No…" if you do not have any form of process for identifying, assessing, and managing risks and/or opportunities.
Explain why you do not evaluate risks and/or opportunities and describe any plans to do so in the future (column 5) 
This column only appears if you select any "No" option in column 1 "Process in place".
Describe the primary reason selected in column 4 "Primary reason for not evaluating risks and/or opportunities".
Describe any plans to evaluate environmental risks and/or opportunities in the future, such as initial measures taken to put an evaluation process in place.
If you selected "Judged to be unimportant or not relevant" in column 4 "Primary reason for not evaluating risks and/or opportunities", explain the criteria used to decide that evaluating risks and/or opportunities is not important or relevant to your organization.
Explain why you do not have a process for evaluating both risks and opportunities that is informed by a dependencies and/or impacts process (column 6) 
This column only appears if you select any option except "Both risks and opportunities" in column 2 "Risks and/or opportunities evaluated in this process" OR if you select "No" in response to column 3 "Is this process informed by the dependencies and/or impacts process?".
If you select any option except "Both risks and opportunities" in column 2 "Risks and/or opportunities evaluated in this process", describe the primary reason for not having a process to evaluate both environmental risks and opportunities and describe any plans to do so in the future.
If you selected "No" in response to column 3 "Is this process informed by the dependencies and/or impacts process?", provide details of why this is the case, and any plans to consider dependencies and/or impacts as part of this process in the future.
Note for Financial Services companies 
This question is asking about the processes used to identify, assess, and respond to environmental risks and/or opportunities within your direct operations and upstream value chain. Please do not report the identification, assessment and management of environmental risks and/or opportunities in your portfolio here. You will be able to do this in 2.2.5.
guidance.textKo: 프로세스 in place (열 1) Select "예" 만약 귀사 has 하나 이상 프로세스 in place for 식별, 평가 및 관리 리스크 및/또는 기회. Select "예" regardless of whether both 리스크 및 기회 are assessed, 및 regardless of whether the 프로세스 is integrated (i.e. across multiple environmental issues, 및 하나 이상 other issues) 또는 separated. You will have the opportunity to provide further details on your assessment 프로세스 in 2.2.2. Only select "No…" 만약 you do not have 하나 이상 form of 프로세스 for 식별, 평가 및 관리 리스크 및/또는 기회. 그 이유를 설명 you do not evaluate 리스크 및/또는 기회 및 설명 하나 이상 plans to do so in the future (열 5) This 열 only appears 만약 you select 하나 이상 "아니요" option in 열 1 "프로세스 in place". 설명 the 주된 이유 선택 in 열 4 "주된 이유 for not evaluating 리스크 및/또는 기회". 설명 하나 이상 plans to evaluate environmental 리스크 및/또는 기회 in the future, such as initial measures taken to put an evaluation 프로세스 in place. 만약 you 선택 "Judged to be unimportant 또는 not relevant" in 열 4 "주된 이유 for not evaluating 리스크 및/또는 기회", explain the criteria used to decide that evaluating 리스크 및/또는 기회 is not important 또는 relevant to 귀사. 그 이유를 설명 you do not have a 프로세스 for evaluating both 리스크 및 기회 that is informed by a dependencies 및/또는 impacts 프로세스 (열 6) This 열 only appears 만약 you select 하나 이상 option except "Both 리스크 및 기회" in 열 2 "리스크 및/또는 기회 evaluated in this 프로세스" 또는 만약 you select "아니요" in response to 열 3 "Is this 프로세스 informed by the dependencies 및/또는 impacts 프로세스?". 만약 you select 하나 이상 option except "Both 리스크 및 기회" in 열 2 "리스크 및/또는 기회 evaluated in this 프로세스", 설명 the 주된 이유 for not having a 프로세스 to evaluate both environmental 리스크 및 기회 및 설명 하나 이상 plans to do so in the future. 만약 you 선택 "아니요" in response to 열 3 "Is this 프로세스 informed by the dependencies 및/또는 impacts 프로세스?", 세부 정보를 입력 of why this is the case, 및 하나 이상 plans to consider dependencies 및/또는 impacts 의 일부로 this 프로세스 in the future. Note for Financial Services companies This 문항 is asking about the 프로세스es used to identify, assess, 및 respond to environmental 리스크 및/또는 기회 within your 직접 운영사업장 및 업스트림 가치사슬. Please do not report the identification, assessment 및 management of environmental 리스크 및/또는 기회 in your 포트폴리오 here. You will be able to do this in 2.2.5.

guidance.text: The organization has a robust process to identify, assess, and manage environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities across its direct operations, value chain, financed activities, and assets.
guidance.textKo: The organization has a robust 프로세스 to identify, assess, 및 manage 환경 의존성, 임팩트, 리스크 및 기회 across its 직접 운영사업장, 가치사슬, financed activities, 및 assets.

guidance.text:
Environmental risks: potential threats (effects of uncertainty) posed to an organization that arise from its and wider society's dependencies and impacts on the environment (adapted from TNFD "Nature related risk", 2023 ).
Environmental opportunities: opportunities are generated through impacts and dependencies on nature, and can occur:
When organizations avoid, reduce, mitigate or manage nature-related risks, for example, connected to the loss of nature and ecosystem services that the organization and society depend on;
Through the strategic transformation of business models, products, services, markets and investments that actively work to reverse the loss of nature, including by restoration, regeneration of nature and implementation of nature-based solutions (adapted from
TNFD "Nature related opportunities", 2023 ).
guidance.textKo: Environmental risks: potential threats (effects of uncertainty) posed to an organization that arise from its 및 wider society's dependencies 및 impacts on the environment (adapted from TNFD "Nature related risk", 2023 ). Environmental opportunities: opportunities are generated through impacts 및 dependencies on nature, 및 can occur: 경우 organizations avoid, reduce, mitigate 또는 manage nature-related risks, for example, connected to the loss of nature 및 ecosystem services that the organization 및 society depend on; Through the strategic transformation of business models, products, services, markets 및 investments that actively work to reverse the loss of nature, 포함 by restoration, regeneration of nature 및 implementation of nature-based solutions (adapted from TNFD "Nature related opportunities", 2023 ).

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 표시된 칸(셀)의 개수에 비례하여 완성된 칸(셀)마다 점수가 부여됩니다. 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 4/4점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Awareness points.
ROUTE A)
'Yes' selected in column 'Process in place' AND 'Both risks and opportunities' selected in column 'Risks and/or opportunities evaluated in this process' - 3/3 points
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'Yes' selected in column 'Process in place' AND
Either 'Risks only' OR 'Opportunities only' selected in column 'Risks and/or opportunities evaluated in this process' - 1.5/3 points
A maximum of 1.5/3 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
'No, but we plan to within the next two years' selected in column 'Process in place' - 0.5/3 points
A maximum of 0.5/3 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: Awareness 점수를 획득하려면 Disclosure에서 최고점을 획득해야 합니다. 경로 A) '예' 선택 in 열 '프로세스 in place' 그리고 'Both 리스크 및 기회' 선택 in 열 '리스크 및/또는 기회 evaluated in this 프로세스' - 3/3 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 3/3점입니다. 또는 경로 B) '예' 선택 in 열 '프로세스 in place' 그리고 Either 'Risks only' 또는 'Opportunities only' 선택 in 열 '리스크 및/또는 기회 evaluated in this 프로세스' - 1.5/3 점 A 최고 of 1.5/3 점 is available for this 경로. 또는 경로 C) 'No, but we plan to within the next two years' 선택 in 열 '프로세스 in place' - 0.5/3 점 A 최고 of 0.5/3 점 is available for this 경로.

change.question_ko: 귀사는 환경 리스크 및 / 또는 기회를 식별 , 평가 및 관리하는 프로세스가 있습니까 ?
change.q2025_text: Does your organization have a process for identifying, assessing, and managing environmental risks and/or opportunities?

change.q2025_textKo: 귀사는 a 프로세스 for 식별, 평가 및 관리 environmental 리스크 및/또는 기회을/를 보유하고 있습니까?

sourceInfo.name: CDP Full Corporate Questionnaire and Reporting Guidance 2026
sourceInfo.nameKo: CDP 2026 전체 기업 문항 및 보고 가이던스

sourceInfo.name: CDP Climate Change Scoring Essential Criteria 2026

moduleTitleKo: 환경 의존성, 임팩트, 리스크 및 기회의 식별, 평가 및 관리
issueTagsKo: 수자원, 해양, 생물다양성, 플라스틱, Climate Change, 산림
sectorTagsKo: 금융 서비스, 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 OEM - EPM, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 농산물 원자재, 운송 OEM, 에너지 유틸리티 및 발전, Biodiversity - Mines, 시멘트, Food, beverage & tobacco, 제지 및 임업, 부동산, 건설
simpleHelpKo: For many organizations, environmental issues pose significant challenges, now 및 in the future. This 문항 establishes whether the organization has a 프로세스 for 식별, 평가 및 관리 environmental issues so that 데이터 사용자 may gauge the 조직의 awareness of its own environmental 리스크 및 기회.
